metadata.methodology: Protected land percentage reflects area within statutory protected areas (SSSIs, NNRs, NPs) meeting ecological condition standards under the 30x30 assessment framework. Species index is a composite of over 1,000 monitored UK species trends indexed to 1970=100. The 3.2% meeting 30x30 ecological standards differs from the 9.2% within protected boundaries because most protected land is in unfavourable condition.
knownIssues: The 3.2% meeting 30x30 ecological standards is a Government assessment — methodology disputed by some conservation organisations who use different condition criteria.
Species index is a composite; individual species trends vary enormously and the aggregate can mask localised recoveries.
Sea 30x30 figure (8%) reflects Marine Protected Area designations, not ecological condition assessments.
